channel.title: Api Design on rapatao.com
channel.description: Recent content in Api Design on rapatao.com

item.title: Contract-First VS Code-First API Documentation
item.description:
API development is a crucial part of modern software development. Designing clear, robust, and easy-to-use APIs not only optimizes the development process but also enhances the developer experience. Two dominant methodologies define how teams approach this: Contract-First and Code-First. Choosing between them affects collaboration, tooling, release pace, and long-term maintainability.

Contract-First API Documentation

Contract-first (also called design-first or API-first) means the API definition is written before any implementation begins. Teams agree on endpoints, request/response schemas, data types, error codes, and versioning strategy upfront. This contract becomes the single source of truth.
